mapper.select:
SELECT id, tax_no, enterprise_name, region_code, security_account_name, status, remark, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM tb_tax_enterprise
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT id, tax_no, enterprise_name, region_code, security_account_name, status, remark, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM tb_tax_enterprise WHERE region_code = #{regionCode} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_tax_enterprise (tax_no, enterprise_name, region_code, security_account_name, status, remark) VALUES (#{taxNo}, #{enterpriseName}, #{regionCode}, #{securityAccountName}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_tax_enterprise SET tax_no = #{taxNo}, enterprise_name = #{enterpriseName}, region_code = #{regionCode}, security_account_name = #{securityAccountName}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, region_code, site_type, etax_entry_url, tpass_base_url, login_success_url, login_button_text, gt4_base_url, declaration_query_url, declaration_query_menu_id, social_security_payment_flow_json, status, remark, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM tb_tax_region_site
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT id, region_code, site_type, etax_entry_url, tpass_base_url, login_success_url, login_button_text, gt4_base_url, declaration_query_url, declaration_query_menu_id, social_security_payment_flow_json, status, remark, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM tb_tax_region_site WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_tax_region_site (region_code, site_type, etax_entry_url, tpass_base_url, login_success_url, login_button_text, gt4_base_url, declaration_query_url, declaration_query_menu_id, social_security_payment_flow_json, status, remark) VALUES (#{regionCode}, #{siteType}, #{etaxEntryUrl}, #{tpassBaseUrl}, #{loginSuccessUrl}, #{loginButtonText}, #{gt4BaseUrl}, #{declarationQueryUrl}, #{declarationQueryMenuId}, #{socialSecurityPaymentFlowJson}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_tax_region_site SET region_code = #{regionCode}, site_type = #{siteType}, etax_entry_url = #{etaxEntryUrl}, tpass_base_url = #{tpassBaseUrl}, login_success_url = #{loginSuccessUrl}, login_button_text = #{loginButtonText}, gt4_base_url = #{gt4BaseUrl}, declaration_query_url = #{declarationQueryUrl}, declaration_query_menu_id = #{declarationQueryMenuId}, social_security_payment_flow_json = #{socialSecurityPaymentFlowJson}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
